scheme.title: Climate Data Hub Format Vocabulary
scheme.description: Data distribution formats used by CDH assets. Concept ids name the site's snippet templates; media_type is matched as a prefix of the asset's media_type. Site-local for now — replace with the standard's published vocabulary when it exists.

concepts.label: Zarr
concepts.best_for: cloud-native analysis, reading just the slices you need from the full cube

concepts.label: Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF
concepts.best_for: single-file downloads, visualisation, and traditional GIS tools

concepts.label: Apache Parquet
concepts.best_for: tabular analysis, with fast filtered reads in pandas, R, or DuckDB
